impact: This advances the PP&D DevHub recorder plan by adding deterministic, fixture-only evidence for sign application draft review screens, including semantic selectors, required fields, upload controls, validation messages, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates without live DevHub automation or private values.
summary: Add a redacted mocked DevHub sign application draft-review snapshot fixture with focused validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-101: Add a mocked DevHub workflow snapshot fixture for sign application draft review that records semantic selectors, required fields, upload controls, validation messages, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates using only redacted values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
